scope: Implement AgenC project instruction file handling with AGENC.md priority, compatibility fallbacks, include expansion, memory-file detection, and the external-include trust dialog.

requiredBehaviors: Project instruction discovery prefers AGENC.md over compatibility fallback files.
AGENTS.md is used when AGENC.md is absent.
CLAUDE.md is used only when both AGENC.md and AGENTS.md are absent.
Root-to-cwd project instruction chains preserve the same priority at each directory.
edgeCases: The byte budget and UTF-8 boundary truncation behavior remain unchanged.
Project onboarding treats fallback instruction files as satisfying project instruction setup.

requiredBehaviors: Managed, user, project, and local instruction tiers remain assembled in that order.
Prompt-facing AGENC.md content expands @include directives with depth, byte, circular-reference, and path-boundary checks.
Memory-facing instruction loading preserves include-parent tracking, external include detection, and warning gating.
edgeCases: Dropped prompt includes remain visible through warning text.
Instruction reload hooks are not fired by cache invalidation that is only needed for correctness.

requiredBehaviors: The external include warning dialog renders AgenC-branded trust copy and the external include list.
Accepting or declining records the AgenC project-config fields used by the instruction loader.
Telemetry event names use AgenC-owned instruction terminology.
edgeCases: The standalone dialog can hide the surrounding border/input guide when embedded.

rows.source: memory scan, taxonomy, age, detection, and selector path sources
requiredBehaviors: Memory directory scanning, taxonomy parsing, freshness text, auto-managed memory detection, and selector path behavior remain owned by the AgenC memory subsystem.
This item reuses those existing AgenC-owned counterparts instead of recreating donor-shaped files under runtime/src/memdir/.
edgeCases: Team memory stays behind existing feature gates.
Session memory files are classified under the AgenC config directory.

intentionalReductions: No files were added under the upstream mirror.
The prompt loader keeps the existing explicit @include syntax rather than accepting every bare at-path token.
The memory scan, type, age, detection, and selector-path behavior already lives in AgenC-owned memory modules from earlier memory items; OB-07 documents and reuses those counterparts.
